title: ansible.schedule Facet
description: The OBSERVED definition of an AWX/AAP schedule, projected read-only by the awx Connector (§1.2). An observed foreign object (→ a Stratt Trigger on cutover). Demanded by the AWX-estate governance Baseline awx-schedule-enabled (enabled==true, the disabled/dead-automation audit) and the cutover. rrule is AWX's iCal recurrence; enabled is whether it fires. Closed (§9).
